subtitle: Marie absent all week, Ivanti incident ongoing, DTP1092 comments blocked
context: Marie Cooksey is out of office until Monday 15 June, creating immediate dependencies across your portfolio. The Critical Ivanti security vulnerability requires urgent testing coordination with Asta Palmer on PeopleXD service requests, and Sarah Warne is awaiting confirmation from you and other stakeholders to proceed. DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal has multiple comments from Marie requiring her input that cannot progress until her return on 15 June. Julie Hickman is awaiting a timeline from AG for the Chemistry bulk-delete case 68974493 before they can proceed. Sophie Levy from Cority has not heard from you since April on the Scoping Session and is waiting for an update. The most time-critical deadline this week is the Ivanti Major Incident coordination - open Emma Fitz-Gibbon's email on Priority 1 Support Call immediately to confirm your participation and understand next steps from Sarah Warne.

urgent.title: Ivanti security vulnerability - Major Incident coordination
urgent.sub: Emma Fitz-Gibbon and Sarah Warne are coordinating urgent response. Your confirmation needed to move forward with testing involvement.
urgent.subject: RE: Major Incident - Priority 1 Support Call# TBC - a Security vulnerability with Ivanti.

urgent.title: DTP1092 comments blocked - Marie absent until 15 June
